header.title: Digital Marketer, Software Developer & Data Analyst
header.description: I am a digital marketer, software developer and data analyst as well as IT professional with a Bachelor of Business Administration degree. I have previous work experience in software development, working with data, and UI/UX design.
header.solution1: I build easy-to-use and clear websites that work on many different devices.
header.solution2: I build automated data solutions that include data pipelines, ETL/ELT processes, and data visualization.
header.solution3: Through data storytelling and visualization, I provide insights and reports that facilitate the decision-making of client companies.

website.experience: Jere demonstrated a good visual eye as well as knowledge of user interface/user experience design. It was also easy to communicate with him. I had a clear vision of what I wanted. Jere implemented this as well as greatly improved it. Recommended!

projects.websites_information: All of these websites are responsive until 320px width.

project1.name: Sentiment analysis: Evaluating customer feedback to support decision making (EN)
project1.description: Data report analyzing Yelp customer reviews of various Korean restaurants. Project utilizes Natural Language Processing (NLP) to classify customer reviews into different sentiments (positive, neutral, negative) and categories (e.g., food, price).

project2.name: Power BI & PowerPoint: Insights through data visualization and storytelling (EN)
project2.description: This project translates electronics sales data to generate insights using a dashboard and a slide presentation.

project3.name: Website template for a band with heavy sound
project3.description: Website utilizes stock photos and AI for text content generation. Website implementation, image editing and video editing are done by me.

project4.name: English-Finnish dictionary for guitarists
project4.description: On this site, the user can learn guitar vocabulary in English and Finnish. Images and vectors from various sites are utilized and the implementation of the site as well as the image editing are done by me.
